LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF STEPHEN O'KANE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-14-536884 AND CGC-14-543332 WITH CASE NO. CGC-14-536879 IS GRANTED. CASE NO. CGC-14-536879 IS THE LEAD CASE AND IS CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NO. CGC-14-536884 AND CASE NO. CGC-14-543332 FOR ALL PURPOSES. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHES THAT COMMON QUESTIONS OF FACT AND LAW ARE INVOLVED IN ALL THREE CASES. (SEE CCP SEC. 1048.) MR. JADALLAH'S ARGUMENT IN OPPOSITION THAT THE DECLARATORY RELIEF CASE SHOULD NOT BE CONSOLIDATED BECAUSE IT IS ENTITLED TO PRIORITY PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 1062.3 IS UNAVAILING. MR. JADALLAH HAS NOT FILED A MOTION ESTABLISHING THE NECESSITY OF A SPEEDY TRIAL, AS REQUIRED BY CCP SEC. 1062.3(B). PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE SUZANNE BOLANOS; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/SRB)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 57627228)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-11-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-14-536884, CGC-14-543332 WITH CASE CGC-14-536879
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN O'KANE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-14-536884 AND CGC-14-543332 WITH CASE NO. CGC-14-536879 is granted. Case no. CGC-14-536879 is the lead case and is consolidated with case no. CGC-14-536884 and case no. CGC-14-543332 for all purposes. Plaintiff establishes that common questions of fact and law are involved in all three cases. (See CCP sec. 1048.) Mr. Jadallah's argument in opposition that the declaratory relief case should not be consolidated because it is entitled to priority pursuant to CCP sec. 1062.3 is unavailing. Mr. Jadallah has not filed a motion establishing the necessity of a speedy trial, as required by CCP sec. 1062.3(b). Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/SB)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Continued To Aug-11-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-14-536884, CGC-14-543332 WITH CASE CGC-14-536879
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Continued To Jun-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN O'KANE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CGC-14-536884, AND CGC-14-543332 WITH CASE CGC-14-536879 is continued to June 26, 2015, to give parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Parties must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 11, 2015, at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
